title: Crispy Naan Nachos
description: A twist on traditional nachos, using crispy naan bread and mexican flavors.
instructions: 2. Arrange crispy naan bread pieces on a baking sheet.
3. Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
4. In a separate pan, heat thai peanut sauce over medium heat.
5. Add diced onions and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Add diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
7. Remove naan bread from oven and top with cheese, sauce mixture, and diced jalapeños (if using).
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
9. Remove from oven and top with chopped cilantro (if using).
